coverage_note: Seed index for foreign personal information, privacy, and data laws. Entries are structured legal-reference records with official or regulator source URLs, not a substitute for authoritative local legal advice.

records.title: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
records.summary: Core EU data protection regime for processing personal data. Establishes principles, legal bases, data subject rights, controller and processor obligations, breach notice, DPIA, and international transfer controls.
key_obligations: Identify a lawful basis before processing personal data and disclose purposes transparently.
Limit processing to specified, explicit, legitimate purposes and necessary data.
Apply additional safeguards for special-category and children data.
Use processor contracts and maintain accountability records.
Use adequacy decisions, standard contractual clauses, binding corporate rules, or other safeguards for international transfers.
Support access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, objection, and automated decision rights.

records.title: ePrivacy Directive
records.summary: EU privacy framework for electronic communications, cookies, terminal equipment access, traffic and location data, and direct marketing communications.
key_obligations: Obtain required consent for storing or accessing information on user devices except for narrow exemptions.
Respect confidentiality of electronic communications and location or traffic data limits.
Provide opt-out and consent controls for direct marketing communications.

records.title: Data Governance Act
records.summary: EU framework for data sharing governance, public-sector data reuse, data intermediation services, and data altruism organisations.
key_obligations: Assess conditions for reuse of protected public-sector data.
Apply neutrality and governance duties for data intermediation services.
Maintain transparency and registration duties for recognised data altruism organisations.

records.title: Data Act
records.summary: EU rules on access to and use of data generated by connected products and related services, business-to-business data sharing, cloud switching, and public-sector access in exceptional need.
key_obligations: Design connected products and related services to make generated data accessible where required.
Provide pre-contractual information on data generation and access.
Handle third-party data access and public-sector requests under the Act's conditions.

records.title: Artificial Intelligence Act
records.summary: EU horizontal AI regulation with prohibitions, high-risk AI obligations, transparency duties, governance requirements, and links to data protection compliance for AI systems.
key_obligations: Classify AI use cases and identify prohibited, high-risk, limited-risk, or GPAI obligations.
For high-risk AI, maintain risk management, data governance, technical documentation, logging, transparency, human oversight, accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity measures.
Disclose required information for certain AI interactions, synthetic content, and biometric categorisation or emotion-recognition contexts.

records.title: UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018
records.effect_level: UK primary legislation and retained GDPR
records.summary: UK data protection regime built around UK GDPR principles and the Data Protection Act 2018, covering general processing, law enforcement processing, intelligence services processing, exemptions, and enforcement.
key_obligations: Follow UK GDPR principles: lawfulness, fairness, transparency, purpose limitation, data minimisation, accuracy, storage limitation, integrity, confidentiality, and accountability.
Provide privacy information and support individual rights.
Apply UK transfer mechanisms for restricted transfers outside the UK.
Meet ICO accountability, security, and breach notification expectations.

records.title: California Consumer Privacy Act as amended by CPRA
records.summary: California comprehensive privacy law covering notice, consumer rights, sale/share opt-out, sensitive personal information limitation, retention disclosure, service provider and contractor terms, and enforcement by CPPA.
key_obligations: Provide notice at collection and privacy policy disclosures.
Support access, deletion, correction, portability, sale/share opt-out, and sensitive personal information limitation rights.
Include required terms with service providers, contractors, and third parties.
Disclose retention periods or criteria and avoid incompatible secondary uses.

records.title: Colorado Privacy Act
records.summary: Colorado comprehensive consumer privacy law with controller duties, processor contracts, rights, sensitive-data consent, opt-out for sale, targeted advertising, and profiling, plus data protection assessments.
key_obligations: Provide clear privacy notice and controller contact information.
Support consumer rights to access, correct, delete, obtain data, and opt out.
Obtain consent for sensitive data and perform data protection assessments for high-risk processing.
Recognise required universal opt-out mechanisms.

records.title: Virginia Consumer Data Protection Act
records.summary: Virginia comprehensive privacy law with controller and processor duties, consumer rights, opt-out rights, sensitive-data consent, and data protection assessments.
key_obligations: Limit collection to adequate, relevant, and reasonably necessary data.
Provide consumer rights and an appeal process.
Execute processor contracts and conduct assessments for high-risk processing.

records.title: Connecticut Data Privacy Act
records.summary: Connecticut comprehensive privacy law with rights, controller duties, opt-outs, sensitive data consent, child data protections, and data protection assessments.
key_obligations: Provide privacy notice and rights mechanisms.
Obtain consent for sensitive data and comply with child-data restrictions.
Implement opt-out mechanisms for targeted advertising, sale, and profiling.

records.title: Utah Consumer Privacy Act
records.summary: Utah consumer privacy law with notice, consumer access/deletion/portability rights, opt-out of sale or targeted advertising, and controller/processor duties.
key_obligations: Provide privacy notice and consumer rights process.
Offer opt-out for sale and targeted advertising.
Present clear notice and opt-out opportunity before processing sensitive data.

records.title: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act
records.official_citation: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act
keywords: Texas Data Privacy and Security Act
records.summary: Texas comprehensive privacy law with broad applicability, consumer rights, opt-outs, sensitive data consent, privacy notice, and data protection assessments.
key_obligations: Support consumer rights and appeal process.
Provide opt-out for targeted advertising, sale, and profiling.
Obtain consent for sensitive data and conduct assessments for high-risk processing.

records.title: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA)
records.official_citation: Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act
records.summary: Canadian federal private-sector privacy law based on fair information principles, consent, access rights, safeguards, openness, accountability, and breach reporting duties.
key_obligations: Obtain meaningful consent and identify purposes.
Limit collection, use, disclosure, and retention.
Provide access and correction rights.
Report certain breaches and maintain breach records.

records.title: Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados Pessoais (LGPD)
records.official_citation: Lei No. 13.709, de 14 de agosto de 2018
records.summary: Brazil's general personal data protection law with legal bases, principles, data subject rights, international transfer rules, processing-agent duties, breach duties, and ANPD enforcement.
key_obligations: Document legal bases and purposes for processing.
Protect sensitive and children's data with heightened care.
Enable data subject rights and transparent notices.
Use contractual and legal safeguards for operators and international transfers.

records.title: Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023
records.summary: India's digital personal data law covering consent, legitimate uses, notices, data fiduciary duties, data principal rights, children's data, cross-border transfer restrictions, and Data Protection Board enforcement.
key_obligations: Provide notice and obtain valid consent unless a legitimate use applies.
Limit retention after purpose completion or consent withdrawal.
Protect children's data and avoid tracking or behavioural monitoring of children where prohibited.
Implement security safeguards and report personal data breaches.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Act 2012
records.summary: Singapore's personal data framework with consent, purpose limitation, notification, access and correction, accuracy, protection, retention limitation, transfer limitation, accountability, breach notification, and DNC obligations.
key_obligations: Meet consent, purpose limitation, and notification obligations.
Protect personal data and cease retention when no longer needed.
Apply transfer limitation controls for overseas transfers.
Notify qualifying data breaches and respect Do Not Call rules.

records.title: Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI)
records.authority: Personal Information Protection Commission / Japanese Law Translation
records.official_citation: Act on the Protection of Personal Information
records.summary: Japan's personal information law governing purpose specification, restrictions on use, sensitive information, third-party provision, foreign transfers, data subject requests, pseudonymised and anonymously processed information, and PPC supervision.
key_obligations: Specify and disclose purposes of use.
Control third-party provision and foreign transfers.
Handle special care-required personal information with appropriate basis.
Respond to disclosure, correction, and suspension requests.

records.title: Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA)
records.summary: South Korea's comprehensive personal information law, covering consent, processing limits, sensitive and unique identifying information, rights, cross-border transfers, security measures, breach notification, and PIPC oversight.
key_obligations: Provide notices and obtain consent where required for collection, use, provision, and overseas transfers.
Apply heightened controls to sensitive and unique identifying information.
Support rights to access, correction, deletion, and suspension.
Maintain technical, managerial, and physical safeguards.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562 (2019)
records.summary: Thailand's general personal data protection law with controller and processor obligations, consent and other legal bases, rights, sensitive data controls, breach notification, and cross-border transfer provisions.
key_obligations: Give privacy notice and identify legal basis for processing.
Use contracts or instructions for processors.
Support rights including access, portability, objection, erasure, restriction, and withdrawal.
Notify personal data breaches where required.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Law
records.official_citation: Undang-Undang Nomor 27 Tahun 2022 tentang Pelindungan Data Pribadi
records.summary: Indonesia's personal data protection law covering personal data controller and processor obligations, lawful processing bases, data subject rights, breach notification, cross-border transfers, and sanctions.
key_obligations: Process personal data on a lawful basis and for specified purposes.
Support data subject rights and correction/deletion mechanisms.
Notify breaches and apply security safeguards.
Meet cross-border transfer requirements.

records.title: Privacy Act 1988 and Australian Privacy Principles
records.summary: Australian privacy framework built around the Australian Privacy Principles, covering collection notice, use/disclosure, direct marketing, cross-border disclosure, access/correction, security, and notifiable data breaches.
key_obligations: Comply with Australian Privacy Principles.
Provide collection notices and limit use and disclosure.
Apply APP 8 controls before cross-border disclosure.
Notify eligible data breaches under the Notifiable Data Breaches scheme.

records.title: Privacy Act 2020
records.summary: New Zealand privacy law with information privacy principles, access and correction rights, notifiable privacy breach duties, and overseas disclosure restrictions.
key_obligations: Collect personal information for lawful, necessary purposes and generally from the individual.
Tell individuals why information is collected and who will receive it.
Protect information and avoid keeping it longer than required.
Notify notifiable privacy breaches and meet overseas disclosure requirements.

records.title: Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA)
records.summary: South Africa's personal information law with eight processing conditions, data subject rights, direct marketing limits, cross-border transfer rules, information officer duties, and regulator oversight.
key_obligations: Meet conditions for lawful processing including accountability, processing limitation, purpose specification, further processing limitation, information quality, openness, security safeguards, and data subject participation.
Use operator contracts and security safeguards.
Control special personal information and children's data.
Meet cross-border transfer and direct marketing requirements.

records.title: Federal Act on Data Protection (FADP)
records.summary: Swiss revised data protection law with transparency duties, privacy by design/default, processing records, data security, breach notification, foreign transfer controls, and automated individual decision information duties.
key_obligations: Provide privacy information and protect data by design and by default.
Maintain records of processing where applicable.
Assess high-risk processing and notify serious data security breaches.
Use adequate safeguards for foreign transfers.

records.title: Law on the Protection of Personal Data (KVKK)
records.official_citation: Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data
records.summary: Türkiye's personal data protection law with explicit consent and statutory exceptions, data subject rights, special-category data controls, transfer restrictions, deletion/destruction/anonymisation, and controller registry duties.
key_obligations: Process personal data with explicit consent or another legal basis.
Give notices and respond to data subject applications.
Delete, destroy, or anonymise personal data when processing grounds cease.
Apply transfer conditions for domestic and cross-border disclosures.

records.title: UAE Personal Data Protection Law
records.official_citation: Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 regarding the Protection of Personal Data
records.summary: UAE federal personal data law for controllers and processors, consent and processing controls, data subject rights, DPO-related duties, breach notice, and cross-border transfers.
key_obligations: Process personal data under lawful conditions and transparent notices.
Support rights to access, correction, restriction, erasure, and portability.
Use processor controls and security measures.
Assess cross-border transfer conditions.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Law
records.summary: Saudi Arabia's personal data law with consent and other processing bases, data subject rights, sensitive data controls, transfer restrictions, breach duties, and regulator oversight.
key_obligations: Provide privacy information and process on a permitted basis.
Protect sensitive data and data subject rights.
Restrict transfers outside the Kingdom unless legal conditions are satisfied.
Notify breaches and maintain appropriate security.

records.title: Personal Data Protection Law
records.official_citation: Ley 25.326 de Protección de los Datos Personales
records.summary: Argentina's personal data law based on consent, data quality, information duties, access/rectification/deletion rights, database rules, sensitive data protections, and international transfer restrictions.
key_obligations: Inform data subjects and obtain consent unless an exception applies.
Maintain data quality and confidentiality.
Support access, rectification, update, and deletion rights.
Control international transfers.

records.title: Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties
records.official_citation: Ley Federal de Protección de Datos Personales en Posesión de los Particulares
records.summary: Mexico's private-sector personal data law covering privacy notices, consent, ARCO rights, sensitive data, transfers, security, and INAI enforcement.
key_obligations: Provide privacy notices and identify data processing purposes.
Obtain consent where required, especially for sensitive data.
Support access, rectification, cancellation, and opposition rights.
Control transfers and maintain security measures.

records.title: Nigeria Data Protection Act
records.summary: Nigeria's national data protection law with lawful bases, controller and processor obligations, data subject rights, transfer safeguards, security and breach duties, and NDPC oversight.
key_obligations: Process personal data lawfully, fairly, and transparently.
Limit processing and retention to necessary purposes.
Support data subject rights and complaints.
Use transfer safeguards and appropriate security.

records.title: Data Protection Act
records.authority: Office of the Data Protection Commissioner
records.summary: Kenya's data protection law with controller and processor obligations, data subject rights, data protection impact assessment, cross-border transfer controls, and ODPC enforcement.
key_obligations: Process personal data in accordance with data protection principles.
Provide privacy information and support data subject rights.
Use DPIA for high-risk processing.
Control transfers outside Kenya and maintain safeguards.
